title: Relatórios em e-mails e atividades
excerpt: I have a list of clients and in it I have records of activities such as calls, emails and others. I need a report with the total activities in this table separated by type of activity

posts.author: Leandroabreu1981 (LEANDRO MATTOS DE ABREU)
